{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Cloud Hammers
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Cloud Hammers]] have the [[Goldsign]] of a raincloud.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
